nodes.context: Irish-American gang active in Boston during Prohibition, involved in hijacking, bootlegging, and armed robbery.

nodes.original_text_name: Joe Lombardo (Lombardi) of the North End
nodes.context: Italian-American gangsters from Boston's North End, involved in bootlegging and organized crime.

edges.context: Lombardo's gang ambushed and killed Gustin leaders Frank Wallace and Bernard Walsh in 1931.
